case_title: MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP VS SMITH, SAMUEL L.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $860.55 FILED BY MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, SAMUEL L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, SAMUEL L.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, SAMUEL L. $860.55 PRINCIPAL, $42.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $902.55 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $22.01 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, SAMUEL L.

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, SAMUEL L.
